description: Mock application packet: John Michael Smith, an adult US tourist entering Mexico by land at the El Chaparral crossing, bound for Baja California, who is not accompanied by a minor and travels alone (applicantIsMinor=false, so the guardian fields are omitted since they are not required or visible). Fabricated details, not a real person. This exact data set was entered field-by-field into the live INM FMM wizard during authoring and produced zero client-side validation errors other than the empty CAPTCHA verification-code field, which this schema does not model.
